archetype: Organic & Earthy with High-Contrast Emergency Accents

brand_identity.description: RaktaSetu AI is an emergency blood and donor intelligence network. It must feel like a serious health platform, prioritizing clarity and rapid action over generic SaaS aesthetics. The design uses high-contrast typography, structural grayscale, and deep crimson accents to drive attention to critical actions.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing with Structured Density. Use 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard (dense, clear data correlation) and 'Bento' or 'Swiss Grid' for the Proof of Work / Landing pages (asymmetrical, breathing room).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard. Emphasize p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Use h-full for children.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Flat solid surfaces. Avoid soft UI everywhere. Mix soft ambient shadows with sharp 1px borders (border-[#E5E5E5]) to ground components.

buttons.primary: bg-[#B91C1C] text-white hover:bg-[#991B1B] font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-3 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111111] border border-[#E5E5E5] hover:bg-[#F3F3F1] font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.urgent_pulse: relative bg-[#DC2626] text-white hover:bg-[#B91C1C] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)] animate-pulse

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.emergency_alert: bg-[#FEE2E2] border border-[#FECACA] rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5] py-4

inputs.default: border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#B91C1C] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all w-full
inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-xl p-8 text-center hover:bg-[#F3F3F1] transition-colors cursor-pointer

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Purposeful, not distracting. Animations should imply speed, processing, and life (pulse).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (staggered for dashboard widgets).

special_effects.heartbeat: Use a keyframe animation that scales 1 -> 1.05 -> 1 to draw attention to the 'Request Blood Now' CTA.
special_effects.ai_processing: Subtle shimmering gradient mask or scanning line across document upload zones.

hero_background.description: Abstract red pulse dark. Use with a heavy white/gray gradient overlay (e.g., bg-white/90) if placed behind text in light theme, or use purely for the 'Emergency AI Mode' section.
hero_background.usage: Use as a dynamic, textured background for the AI Proof of Work or Emergency Request section.

trust_human.usage: Use in the 'About the Mission' or 'Trust & Safety' section.

blood_camp.description: Person donating blood in a medical setting.
blood_camp.usage: Use for the 'Blood Camp Organizer' promotional section or Donor Registration card.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the crimson brand color is pure white. Avoid low-contrast gray text on light gray backgrounds.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='emergency-request-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install @phosphor-icons/react and framer-motion. Configure tailwind.config.js with Cabinet Grotesk and Manrope.
instructions_to_main_agent.structure: Build a hybrid app. Route `/` is the marketing/mission page. Route `/emergency` is the AI Request flow. Route `/dashboard` is the Smart Donor Matching & Camp Organizer view. Route `/architecture` is the Proof of Work page.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: Do not build complex dropdowns, selects, or dialogs from scratch. Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the styling to remove generic SaaS looks—make them match the flat, crisp, organic healthcare theme.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_display: For the donor matching, use dense lists with clear status indicators (Eligible, ETA 15 mins). Use progress bars or ring charts for match scores.
